ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "task_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of the task in minutes */,
  "task_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity level of the task (low, medium, high) */,
  "task_category" TEXT /* Category of the task (ergonomic, environmental, mechanical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency record */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task */,
  "not_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the task is not required */,
  "required_1_to_5_times_per_day" INTEGER /* Indicates if the task is required 1 to 5 times per day */,
  "required_half_of_a_day" INTEGER /* Indicates if the task is required half of a day */,
  "required_less_than_half_of_a_day" INTEGER /* Indicates if the task is required less than half of a day */,
  "required_more_than_half_of_a_day" INTEGER /* Indicates if the task is required more than half of a day */,
  "yes" INTEGER /* Binary yes/no response for the task */,
  "average_frequency_per_month" INTEGER /* Average frequency of the task per month */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the frequency data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frequency_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "department" INTEGER /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's supervisor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Facility or location where the employee works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task log entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee performing the task */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task performed */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the task performance */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the task in minutes */,
  "completed_by_supervisor" INTEGER /* Indicates if the task was completed and verified by a supervisor */,
  "safety_gear_used" INTEGER /* Indicates if safety gear was used during the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task assessed */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk associated with the task */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommended actions to mitigate the risk */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the risk assessment was conducted */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the safety officer or assessor who conducted the assessment */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up actions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the department manager */,
  "location" TEXT /* Facility or location of the department */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "required_certifications" TEXT /* Certifications required for the role */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Key responsibilities of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_gear" (
  "gear_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of safety gear */,
  "gear_name" TEXT /* Name of the safety gear */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the safety gear */,
  "required_for_tasks" TEXT /* Tasks for which the gear is required */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gear_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
